face.structure: oval with defined cheekbones and a sharp jawline

eyes.color: deep onyx with slight hints of indigo
details: iris features a subtle starburst pattern
sharp contrast between pupil and sclera
fine radiant highlights near the pupil edge

face.expression: neutral yet observant, with a slight furrow of concentration in the brows

skin.rendering_notes: soft transitions between shadows and highlights, emphasizing the cheekbone structure

hair.style: straight with a subtle wave at the ends
details: a side-swept fringe partially covering the left eye
hair strands catch light, showing subtle color variations

character.aura: quiet strength with an undercurrent of mystery

details: a slim belt accentuating the waist
outfit.fit: tailored perfectly to accentuate form without constraining movement

composition.framing: mid-shot focused around the torso and face
composition.pose: standing with a slight forward lean
composition.gesture: one hand resting against the chin in contemplation

background.color_palette: cool blues and purples with faint lighter highlights
background.details: subtle gradient creating a sense of depth, no distracting elements
background.rules: should not detract from character, simply enhance mood
